Are you there for me?<|19.90|><|endoftext|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> What better way, my friends, to be there for God every day following this one than by seeing God in each other, by embodying those values of disruption and mercy and compassion,<|23.30|><|endoftext|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> By treating each other as tenderly as we would a newborn child.<|7.04|> <|8.32|> By proclaiming the good news of great joy to all the people.<|15.88|> <|16.94|> It is for all the people and we are to proclaim it to all the people.<|23.18|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Are you there for me?<|3.50|> <|5.02|> My friends, every day after this one, it is our turn to affirm the story.<|13.54|> <|14.92|> Amen.<|15.26|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Amen.<|0.64|><|endoftext|>
